---
title: "Geomorphology"
subtitle: "Study of landforms, their processes, and the forces that shape Earth's surface."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

Welcome to the **Geomorphology** module of Geography OpenCourseWare. This course explores the origin, evolution, and classification of landforms across Earth's surface.

---

## Unit Overview: Fundamental Concepts
{{< include geomorphology/01-fundamental-concepts.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/02-factors-controlling-landform-development.md >}}

---

## Earth's Interior & Crustal Evolution
{{< include geomorphology/26-physical-conditions-of-the-earths-interior.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/25-origin-and-evolution-of-the-earths-crusts.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/22-fundamentals-of-geomagnetism.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/24-isostasy.md >}}

---

## Tectonics & Mountain Building
{{< include geomorphology/06-continental-drift-and-plate-tectonics.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/04-geosynclines.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/05-recent-views-on-mountain-building.md >}}

---

## Geomorphic Processes (Endogenic & Exogenic)
{{< include geomorphology/18-endogenic-processes.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/27-volcanicity.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/17-earthquakes-and-tsunamis.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/20-exogenic-processes.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/03-denudation-processes-weathering-and-erosion.md >}}

---

## The Geomorphic Cycle & Slope Development
{{< include geomorphology/07-concept-of-the-geomorphic-cycle.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/16-denudation-chronology.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/19-erosion-surfaces.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/10-slope-forms-and-processes.md >}}

---

## Systematic Landform Geography
{{< include geomorphology/21-fluvial-geomorphology.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/13-channel-morphology.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/12-aeolian-processes.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/09-karst-cycles.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/14-coastal-geomorphology.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/23-glacial-periglacial-landforms.md >}}

---

## Applied Geomorphology
{{< include geomorphology/11-applied-geomorphology.md >}}

<!-- Cleanup hidden includes -->
{{< include geomorphology/08-landforms-associated-with.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/15-course-content.md >}}
